tldr: Harness engineering argues that agent systems work best when repository structure and runtime legibility are deliberately designed.
decision_reasons: It contains portable operating patterns rather than only opinion.
The summary does not replace the implementation details.

atom_candidates.claim: Repository-local artifacts should act as the system of record for agent work.
Runtime legibility is a prerequisite for agents to validate and debug their own work.

evidence_selectors.suffix: for agents to validate and debug their own work

corrected: Kept repository legibility and runtime legibility as separate atoms.
